ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Mackerel (Scomber scombrus) 41%, sauce 35% (water, sunflower oil, tomato concentrate, sugar, wine, mustard seeds, iodized salt, alcohol vinegar, wine vinegar, spices), vegetables in variable proportions 24% (carrots, turnips, green tomatoes, cucumbers, celery and red peppers, celery stalks).
